schedule.description: S1: FOSI AI Use Gap Study
S2: Social Media Safety Features Fail
S4: PPLD Summer Adventure — 17 Days Left
S5: Musical Mondays at Monument Valley Park

stories.title: FOSI Study — Parents Underestimate Kids' AI Use

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
New survey: 38% of kids used AI in the past week.

Only 27% of their parents think so.

That 11-point gap is the key finding from a 4,000-family study published this week. Worth a conversation tonight. 🤔

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The AI gap is widest — but not the only one.

Kids vs. parents this week:
Scrolling social media: 54% vs. 46%
Posting on social media: 38% vs. 30%
Using AI tools: 38% vs. 27%

Is there a gap in your household?

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Your Kid Probably Used AI This Week. You Might Not Know It.

stories.title: Social Media Safety Features Study — Fewer Than Half Work

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Researchers tested 86 child safety features on TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat, and YouTube.

35 of them worked.

Every platform failed more than half its own safety claims.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
NYU + Northeastern on social media child safety features:

"We have found systemic issues with the design and implementation of many of these features."

Platform controls aren't enough. Time for a different approach.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Researchers Tested 86 Social Media Safety Features for Kids. Fewer Than Half Worked.

stories.title: COS Splash Pads 2026 — What's Open and What's Not

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Heads up COS parents: Julie Penrose Fountain is NOT open this summer.

The 4 free splash pads that ARE:
• Briargate
• Watering Hole at Venezia Park
• Deerfield Hills Spray Ground
• Uncle Wilber Fountain

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
COS splash pads — free through Labor Day:

Briargate: sessions 10 AM, 12:30, 3, 4:30 PM
Venezia Watering Hole: 10 AM–6 PM
Deerfield Hills: sessions 10 AM–5 PM
Uncle Wilber: drop-in 12–6 PM

☀️ All free, no tickets

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: COS Splash Pads 2026: 4 Free Sites Open Now (and One That's Closed)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
PPLD Summer Adventure ends July 31.

17 days left to register and win prizes — including a night at The Broadmoor Cloud Camp.

Any age. Free. ppld.org/summer or any library branch.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: PPLD Summer Adventure Ends July 31 — 17 Days Left to Win Big Prizes

stories.title: Musical Mondays at Monument Valley Park — Free

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Free outdoor concerts at Monument Valley Park every Monday in July.

Next up: July 20, 6:30 PM — WireWood Station (Americana).

30 W. Dale St. Food trucks on site. Parking tight — arrive early.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Musical Mondays at Monument Valley Park: Free Outdoor Concerts Every Monday in July
